refnamediv.refpurpose: Tests if two geometries represent the same geometry and have points in the same directional order

refsection.title: Description

note.para: This function is implemented as per the ArcSDE SQL specification rather than SQL-MM. http://edndoc.esri.com/arcsde/9.1/sql_api/sqlapi3.htm#ST_OrderingEquals

refsection.title: Examples
